shortDescription: Relaxed-taper fleece sweatpants that pair with the Core Heavyweight Hoodie.
sizeGuideInfo: Relaxed, tapered fit. Select your regular size for the intended fit or size down for a closer fit.
name: 2Fitty Core Relaxed Sweatpants
materials: [420 GSM cotton fleece blend], [80% cotton, 20% polyester]
fit: Relaxed through the thigh, tapered at the ankle.
careInstructions: [Machine wash cold, inside out]. [Tumble dry low].
description: The 2Fitty Core Relaxed Sweatpants feature a relaxed-through-the-thigh, tapered-at-the-ankle silhouette in soft brushed fleece. An elastic drawstring waistband and ribbed ankle cuffs keep the fit clean, with a small embroidered 2F mark at the hip. Designed to be worn alone or matched with the Core Heavyweight Hoodie as a set.
